title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・両雄振るわず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither Satono Diamond nor Kitasan Black
manage to win. All the same, they put on an
unparalleled race and leave the crowd speechless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They didn't win, but they congratulate each other
for reaching new heights. Until someone
interrupts them, that is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio. Impressed
by Satono Diamond and Kitasan Black both,
they've come to challenge them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has decided to run in the
autumn Tenno Sho, and Tokai Teio in the Japan
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond wants to run in the autumn
Tenno Sho. I give my approval, but suggest the
Kyoto Daishoten as a warm-up.
